data.title: Aktsiaselts Infortar Investor Webinar introducing the results of the Q1 2026
data.description: On May 4, 2026, Infortar is set to hold a webinar for investors at 12:00 (EET) in Estonian and at 14:00 (EET) in English. This event aims to present the company's first quarter 2026 results. Key speakers include Managing Director Martti Talgre and Investor Relations Manager Kadri Laanvee.

data.title: BlackRock® Canada Announces April Cash Distributions for the iShares® ETFs
data.description: Today, BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited, a subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc., revealed the cash distributions for iShares ETFs listed on TSX or Cboe Canada in April 2026. These payments are monthly and will be awarded to unitholders recorded for the respective iShares ETF on April 27, 2026. The cash distributions for these ETFs are scheduled to be paid out on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Bombardier and Vista Sign Service Agreement Focused on Smart Parts Programs
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Bombardier partnered with Vista to unveil a new long-term services agreement relating to Bombardier’s Smart Parts programs. This deal applies to Vista's recent purchase of Challenger 3500 aircraft and a significant portion of their current fleet. Under this customized agreement, Vista will benefit from a cost-per-flight hour structure, ensuring optimal convenience and cost stability for parts.

data.title: Fortuna Establishes Presence in the Guyana Shield Through Quartzstone Earn-In Agreement
data.description: Fortuna Mining Corp. has recently signed an agreement with Qstone Inc., a private Guyanese company, to obtain up to a 70% stake in the Quartzstone Project. This project covers a significant area of 29,600 hectares situated in the greenstone belt in north central Guyana. The agreement allows Fortuna to potentially acquire a majority interest in the project, indicating a substantial development in the mining sector. This collaboration signifies a significant opportunity for both companies to leverage their expertise and resources in the exploration and potential exploitation of the mineral-rich land package. The agreement signifies a strategic move for Fortuna Mining Corp. (NYSE: FSM | TSX: FVI) as they expand their portfolio and presence in the region.

data.title: The 9th China Festival of Education: Shaping the Future of Learning
data.description: The 9th China Festival of Education, held on April 18, 2026 in Shanghai, saw a record-breaking turnout with over 70 speakers and 800 attendees from various parts of China and globally. This event has become a crucial platform in the country, attracting unprecedented participation numbers.

data.title: VISTA AND BOMBARDIER SIGN GLOBAL SERVICE AGREEMENT FOCUSED ON TAILORED SMART PARTS PROGRAM
data.description: Affirming its dedication to providing excellent customer service globally, Vista, the top private aviation group, revealed today in Dubai, UAE on April 20, 2026, a new services agreement focused on Bombardier's Smart Parts program. This move demonstrates Vista's emphasis on quality service delivery, showcasing their commitment to client satisfaction.

data.title: Conflicts in D.C. cause chaos in El Paso due to a laser weapon malfunction, leading to challenges for the city.
data.description: A city experienced a night of disruptions due to conflicts between government agencies and the deployment of a powerful laser weapon.

data.title: Satellite Boom Launches STMicroelectronics Stock Into Orbit
data.description: STMicroelectronics is benefiting from its involvement in the surge of low-earth-orbit communications satellites, leading to an upgrade in STM stock. The post titled "Satellite Boom Launches STMicroelectronics Stock Into Orbit" highlights the company's positive performance in this sector.

data.title: Here Are The Biggest Losers From Oil Stock Rout
data.description: Oil stocks experienced a significant drop following Iran's announcement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. This news resulted in a widespread sell-off in the oil sector. The reopening of the strait seemed to have a negative impact on oil prices and stocks, causing a noticeable downturn in the market. The aftermath of this decision led to a substantial decline in the value of oil-related companies. The effects of this move were felt across the industry, with many major players experiencing losses. Overall, the news of the Strait of Hormuz reopening had a notable effect on the stock market, particularly in the oil sector, with significant numbers of companies facing declines.

data.title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Results of Tender Offers for Any and All of its Outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052
data.description: Diamondback Energy, Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its recent tender offers to acquire any and all outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052. These offers were made through the Offer to Purchase dated April 6, 2026, along with the Notice of Guaranteed Delivery. The deadline for the Offers was April 10, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. EST. The company, traded as NASDAQ: FANG, confirmed the expiration of the Offers for the Notes.

data.title: Kevin Klose, renowned journalist at The Washington Post, passed away at 85. He played a key role in expanding NPR's coverage.
data.description: The former journalist at The Washington Post, known for his extensive experience, utilized his exceptional fundraising skills to significantly enhance the radio organization's coverage.
